---
title: "Session 3: EDA"
session_id: session-03
format:
  html: default
  ipynb: default
---

## Task

Work through the Session 3 exercise on EDA.

::: {.content-visible when-profile="assign"}
1. Review the lecture concepts.
2. Apply the concepts to the provided data or examples.
:::

::: {.content-visible when-profile="solution"}
1. Compare your solution with the discussed workflow.
2. Reflect on assumptions, limitations, and next steps.
:::
